name: command-execute-pattern
description: status/costs commands follow execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> with project_override: Option<&Path> threaded from main.rs run_command. All DB opens guarded by PathBuf::from(&path).exists() check to handle missing DBs gracefully.

name: scaffold-cmds-execute-pattern
description: init/spec/hooks commands expose standalone execute functions — no subcommand parsing, clean pub fn execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> signatures — wiring handled by lead in mod.rs + main.rs

content: stop/clean/nudge commands follow execute(args...) -> Result<(), String> with project_override: Option<&Path>. stop uses agent_name: &str, force: bool, clean_worktree: bool, json: bool. nudge uses agent_name: &str, message: Option<&str>, from: &str, force: bool, json: bool.
